title: Essential Optimized
description: Essential Optimized is a lightweight performance modpack that boosts FPS, reduces lag, and improves stability—while keeping Minecraft fully vanilla. Simple, fast, and efficient for any world or playstyle.
body:
# Essential Optimized

**Essential Optimized** is a lightweight performance modpack that makes Minecraft smoother, faster, and more stable—while keeping the game fully vanilla.

## ✅ Features
- Higher FPS  
- Reduced lag and stutters  
- Faster loading  
- Better chunk performance  
- Vanilla-friendly optimizations  

## ✅ Why Essential Optimized?
A clean and simple setup with only the **essential** performance mods—no bloat, no changes to gameplay, just a smoother Minecraft experience.

## ✅ Perfect For
- Low-end to high-end PCs  
- Vanilla players  
- Survival, building, PvP, and SMP  
- Anyone wanting plug-and-play performance
